languages.text: "С вашего позволения, Лорд-капитан, я побуду тут на случай, если вокс оживет или с флагмана прилетит эвакуационная группа".

traits.locale_text: "Я не могу оставить шаттл, Лорд-капитан. Побуду тут на случай, если вокс оживет или с флагмана прилетит эвакуационная группа".
traits.speaker: OurCrewPilot

languages.text: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."
languages.original_text: "С вашего позволения, Лорд-капитан, я побуду тут на случай, если вокс оживет или с флагмана прилетит эвакуационная группа".

traits.locale_text: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."
"With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."
"I'll remain here, Lord Captain, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."
"With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."
"With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、ヴォックスが復旧するか、旗艦から救難班が到着したときに備えて、私はここに留まります」
languages.original_text: "I'll remain here, Lord Captain, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、ヴォックスが復旧するか、旗艦から救難班が到着したときに備えて、私はここに留まります。」

languages.text: « Avec votre permission, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, je vais rester ici au cas où le vox se remettrait à fonctionner ou que le vaisseau amiral nous enverrait une équipe d'évacuation. »
languages.original_text: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."

traits.locale_text: « Avec votre permission, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, je vais rester ici au cas où le vox se remettrait à fonctionner ou que le vaisseau amiral nous enverrait une équipe d'évacuation. »

languages.text: "İzninizle Lord Kaptan, voksun çalışmaya başlaması ya da sancak gemisinden tahliye ekibi gelmesi ihtimaline karşın burada kalacağım."
languages.original_text: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."

traits.locale_text: "İzninizle Lord Kaptan, voksun çalışmaya başlaması ya da sancak gemisinden tahliye ekibi gelmesi ihtimaline karşın burada kalacağım."

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr gestattet, Lord Captain, bleibe ich hier für den Fall, dass das Vox wieder funktioniert und das Flaggschiff ein Bergungsteam schickt."
languages.original_text: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr gestattet, Lord Captain, bleibe ich hier für den Fall, dass das Vox wieder funktioniert und das Flaggschiff ein Bergungsteam schickt."

languages.text: «Con su permiso, Lord Capitán, yo me quedaré aquí por si el voco empieza a funcionar de nuevo o llega un equipo de rescate de la nave insignia».
languages.original_text: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."

traits.locale_text: «Con su permiso, Lord Capitán, yo me quedaré aquí por si el voco empieza a funcionar de nuevo o llega un equipo de rescate de la nave insignia».

languages.text: “舰长大人，如果您允许，我会留在这里。万一音阵恢复，或者旗舰派来救援队，也好有个接应。”
languages.original_text: "With your permission, Lord Captain, I'll remain here, in case the vox starts working or an evacuation team arrives from the flagship."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，如果您允许，我会留在这里。万一音阵恢复，或者旗舰派来救援队，也好有个接应。”
